summary: Validated PCAE v0.1 packaging/install readiness: editable install, non-editable local install, and python -m build (sdist+wheel) all succeeded in throwaway venvs. Fixed 2 release-critical defects: pcae health/check crashed outside a git repo (now fails cleanly via a narrowly-scoped subprocess.CalledProcessError catch in cli.py main()); sdist swept in the entire repo by default (44,399 files incl. .claude/.pcae state), now scoped to 117 files via explicit sdist include list. Golden workflow smoke-tested against a fresh clone; Telegram confirmed safely skippable. No packaging blockers remain. 20 new tests. Recommends 106E.

phase_commits.message: Validate v0.1 packaging and clean smoke test

note: Corrected dispatch, sent after pcae push resolved final push state. The earlier pcae task finish --commit run for this same phase correctly reported skipped_incomplete instead of dispatching partial, and pcae push check correctly passed despite the pre-push report (both demonstrating preserved 105C.1/105D behavior). Two release-critical packaging defects found and fixed (see summary); an initial fix attempt for the git-repo crash broke 40 existing tests and was corrected before finalizing (fast-green re-confirmed 4390/4390 after correction).
no_go_confirmation: No runtime enforcement. No autonomous execution. No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution beyond existing lifecycle/test/packaging command behavior. No shell execution beyond existing lifecycle/test/packaging command behavior. No network call outside the existing Telegram outbound notification path. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No push authorization changes beyond existing governed lifecycle. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram outbound-only. Execution unavailable. All auth flags False. v0.1 remains non-executing by design. v0.2 remains the autonomy target. Recommends 106E.
